ddls:
CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "searches" REAL /* Number of searches on the given date */,
  "observed_sales" INTEGER /* Observed sales on the given date */,
  "gru_prediction" REAL /* Prediction of sales by the GRU model */,
  "gru_error" REAL /* Error in the GRU prediction */,
  "naive_prediction" INTEGER /* Prediction of sales by the naive model */,
  "naive_error" INTEGER /* Error in the naive prediction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "product_price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  "model_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics to evaluate the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to evaluate the model */,
  "evaluation_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point where the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or action taken for the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date of the last data ingestion */,
  "source_owner" TEXT /* Owner of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_ingestion" (
  "ingestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingestion event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "ingestion_date" TEXT /* Date of the ingestion event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ingestion */,
  "ingestion_details" TEXT /* Details of the ingestion event */,
  "ingestion_method" TEXT /* Method used for data ingestion */,
  "ingestion_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data ingestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingestion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_ingestion_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the training event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training */,
  "training_details" TEXT /* Details of the training event */,
  "training_method" TEXT /* Method used for model training */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Data used for model training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction */,
  "prediction_details" TEXT /* Details of the prediction event */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for model prediction */,
  "prediction_data" TEXT /* Data used for model prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "ingestion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingestion event */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Rule used for data validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  "validation_details" TEXT /* Details of the validation event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_ingestion_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingestion_id") REFERENCES data_ingestion ("ingestion_id")
)
